bird.summary: The Calabarzon babbler (Sterrhoptilus affinis) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It is endemic to the Philippines found in t…

locations.name: 卡拉巴松
locations.summary: 卡拉巴松(Calabarzon)為菲律賓呂宋的一個大區，地區中心為內湖省卡蘭巴，又稱Region IV-A，卡拉巴松一詞由下轄的五個省份的名稱取部分字母組合而成，分別為甲米地省(CAvite)、內湖省(LAguna)、八打雁省(BAtan…

locations.name: 中央吕宋
locations.summary: 中央吕宋是菲律宾的第三大区，位于吕宋岛中部，下辖奥罗拉、新怡诗夏、打拉、三描礼士、巴丹、邦板牙和布拉干等7个省，总面积为21 543平方千米，人口为11,218,177（2015年），首府位于圣费尔南多。 外部链接 中央吕宋网 （页面存档…

locations.name: 比科爾區
locations.summary: 比科尔（英语：Bicol）也被稱為比科蘭迪亞，是菲律宾的一个大区，主要由吕宋岛东南部的比科尔半岛和相邻的两个岛屿等组成，面积共18,054.3平方千米，占菲律宾土地总面积的5.9％，大区首府是黎牙实比市。 行政区划 包括6个省份：阿尔拜省…

locations.name: 卡坦端内斯省
locations.summary: 卡坦端内斯省（英文：Catanduanes Province），菲律賓華人称葛丹戀尼示省，是菲律賓呂宋比科爾區政區的一個省份，首府為比拉克（Virac），東隔馬卻達海峽與南甘馬粦省相望。

relations.subject: Calabarzon babbler
relations.evidence: Contrary to its name, it is also found outside the Calabarzon region where it also inhabits Central Luzon, Bicol Peninsula and Catanduanes

relations.subject: Calabarzon babbler
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Calabarzon babbler
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
